title: kashal #3782
definition:
1) to stumble, stagger, totter
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to stumble
        1a2) to totter
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to stumble
        1b2) to be tottering, be feeble
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to cause to stumble, bring injury or ruin to, overthrow
        1c2) to make feeble, make weak
    1d) (Hophal) to be made to stumble
    1e) (Piel) bereave
